unit: PR11 — Final sweep: drop 'draft' from prose, README, package.json, dead refs

contract.goal: Close out repo-compartmentalize Phase 3 (and the project) with a 'satisfying draft-is-gone' sweep across the active surface. PR6 dissolved the draft-* CLI modules in plugins/commons/cli/lib/; PR8-10 cleaned up the marketplace shape. PR11 finishes the job by removing 'draft' from package.json (description + keywords), projects/CONVENTIONS.md (substrate description + verb name + sync-shared description), and two prose references (loom/draft CLI mention + dead /draft-revise skill ref). Plus two adjacent findings PLAN PR11 missed: a stale `cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts` path in CONVENTIONS.md (broken after PR9 moved the test) and a stale sync-shared description in CONVENTIONS.md (describes the OLD root→plugin direction, replaced by commons→consumer in PR4/PR9). Both are downstream consequences of earlier PRs; same finding shape as PR9's derive-panel cleanup; reasonable to fold in here for the satisfying close-the-loop.
acceptance_criteria: package.json:4 description: 'Marketplace for the draft/guild/griot/loom agent framework' → drop 'draft/' (becomes 'Marketplace for the guild/griot/loom agent framework' or similar).
package.json:14 keywords: 'draft' entry removed from the array (alphabetically the array now reads agent-skills, claude-code, guild, griot, loom, skills-cli-marketplace).
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:3 substrate-description: 'loom / draft / guild / griot substrate' → drop 'draft / ' (becomes 'loom / guild / griot / ev substrate' since ev is now a family member too).
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:68-69 Category-3 verb example: 'draft revise' → 'loom revise-plan' (the actual verb that mutates PLAN.md — exists today in loom CLI).
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:88 declared-exceptions PLAN.md description: 'Mutated by `draft revise`' → 'Mutated by `loom revise-plan`'.

projects/CONVENTIONS.md:123-128 sync-shared description rewritten for new direction (was 'Reads top-level cli/lib/ + cli/verbs/<family>/ and writes per-plugin subsets under plugins/<name>/cli/'; should become 'Reads plugins/commons/{cli/lib,docs}/ and writes per-plugin subsets under plugins/<name>/{cli/lib,docs}/ for consumer plugins').
plugins/guild/agents/whiteboard-sketch-ideation.md:87 prose: 'the loom/draft CLIs, scripts' → 'the loom CLI, scripts' (drop '/draft' from the CLI enumeration).

plugins/ev/skills/ev-loop-confidence/SKILL.md:26 prose: 'No ambient `/loom-*` or `/draft-revise` skills' → 'No ambient `/loom-*` skills' (drop the dead /draft-revise reference — that skill never shipped under that name).

Final draft-sweep grep returns only intentional content-draft hits (per PLAN PR11's allowlist): `# Learning draft` headers in plugins/<plugin>/cli/verbs/griot/capture.{ts,test.ts}, content-draft prose in plugins/<plugin>/skills/loom-plan/SKILL.md and loom-archive/SKILL.md ('strawman draft', 'opinionated draft', etc.), --pr-state=draft test values (GitHub draft PR state, not the legacy CLI), and slug-fixture references like '2026-05-15-draft-cli' (test data for slug parsing). Project-name historical refs (`loom-absorb-draft`, `2026-05-17-loom-absorb-draft/PLAN.md`) are also preserved — they name an actual past project.
rules_applied: PLAN.md § PR11 — final 'satisfying close-the-loop' diff. Removes the last traces of the dissolved draft-* CLI shape from prose surfaces.

PLAN PR11 also called for fixing the bogus 'LOOM-CONVENTIONS § Pairing with draft' cite at cli/lib/project.ts:148-151. That file was deleted in PR9 (root cli/); the post-PR9 file is plugins/commons/cli/lib/project.ts. Verified — no such cite exists there today (it was either dropped during PR3's move to commons, PR6's draft dissolution, or never existed in the post-move version). Strike from PR11 scope.

Scope additions from this session's audit: CONVENTIONS.md:7 (stale cli/ path) and CONVENTIONS.md:123-128 (stale sync-shared description) are downstream consequences of PR4 and PR9 that PLAN PR11 didn't anticipate. Same finding shape as PR9's derive-panel.ts cleanup — reasonable to fold in here for the satisfying close-the-loop.

Content-draft preservation rule: 'draft' as a content sense (Learning draft, strawman draft, draft response, post is draft) stays — those describe intentional rough-content semantics and are independent of the dissolved CLI shape. Only API-surface 'draft' references get swept.
Project-name preservation rule: `loom-absorb-draft` and `2026-05-17-loom-absorb-draft/PLAN.md` are historical project slugs; renaming them would rewrite project history. Stays.
disqualifiers: Touching anything in plugins/<plugin>/docs/ — those files are synced from plugins/commons/docs/ via sync-shared.ts. Any 'draft' references in commons/docs (e.g. 'loom-absorb-draft' project name in LOOM-CONVENTIONS) are out of scope here (project names; historical narrative).
Renaming the `loom-absorb-draft` project slug anywhere (history; not API).
Touching `# Learning draft` template strings in griot capture (intentional content-draft semantics).
Touching test fixtures with 'draft' slug values ('2026-05-15-draft-cli', '2026-05-15-draft-only' — those are slug-parser test data).
Touching --pr-state=draft test values (GitHub state, not CLI name).
Touching plain-prose 'draft' / 'drafted' uses describing content-as-a-thing (strawman draft, opinionated draft, post is draft, etc.).
Modifying any plugin's cli/ implementation beyond pure prose comments — PR11 is prose-only.
Adding new tests (PR11 is a sweep, not new coverage).
Drift on `node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check` after the change.
inputs: projects/CONVENTIONS.md:3,7,68,88,123-128 (substrate description, stale cli/ path, verb name, exception description, sync-shared description)

actions: Stashed PR10 orphan pr-opened event (substrate gap #3, 3rd reoccurrence). Synced main from origin (was 2 commits behind after PR #27 merge). Reset cleanup branch. Popped stash to land in PR11's first commit as bookkeeping carry.

Audited PR11 surface: 9 active 'draft' references to sweep + 2 adjacent CONVENTIONS.md findings (stale cli/ path post-PR9, stale sync-shared description from pre-PR4). Verified content-draft references (Learning draft / strawman draft / draft responses / 'draft' as design status / --pr-state=draft / slug fixtures with 'draft' prefix / loom-absorb-draft project name) all stay per PLAN PR11's allowlist.

Verified PLAN PR11's `cli/lib/project.ts:148-151` bogus LOOM-CONVENTIONS cite item — that file was deleted in PR9 (root cli/); the post-PR9 file is plugins/commons/cli/lib/project.ts. Grep-verified no such cite exists there today. Strike from PR11 scope.
Wrote contract-only checkin 11. Skipped grill — clean draft; the two scope additions are explicitly justified in the contract.
package.json:4 description: dropped 'draft/' → 'Marketplace for the guild/griot/loom agent framework'.
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:3: 'loom / draft / guild / griot' → 'loom / guild / griot / ev' (drops draft AND adds ev which became a family member after the marketplace migration).
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:68-69: 'draft revise' → 'loom revise-plan' in Category-3 verb example.
projects/CONVENTIONS.md:88: 'Mutated by `draft revise`' → 'Mutated by `loom revise-plan`' in PLAN.md declared-exception description.

projects/CONVENTIONS.md:123-128: rewrote sync-shared description from old 'reads top-level cli/lib/+cli/verbs/<family>/, writes per-plugin subsets' to new 'reads plugins/commons/{cli/lib,docs}/, writes per-plugin subsets under plugins/<name>/{cli/lib,docs}/' (matches the actual post-PR4 + post-PR9 architecture).
plugins/guild/agents/whiteboard-sketch-ideation.md:87: 'the loom/draft CLIs, scripts' → 'the loom CLI, scripts' (dropped '/draft').
plugins/ev/skills/ev-loop-confidence/SKILL.md:26: 'No ambient `/loom-*` or `/draft-revise` skills' → 'No ambient `/loom-*` skills' (dropped dead `/draft-revise` ref; that skill never shipped).

Verified final draft-sweep: 5 remaining hits across active surface, all intentional content-draft semantics (clean draft, draft responses x2, loom-absorb-draft project name, 'draft' or 'in-progress' design status).
Verified npm test → 637/637 across 39 test files (unchanged; prose-only edits don't move tests).
Verified node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check → ok (4 plugins synced).
Panel: evaluator-contract-fit (only applicable evaluator for prose+config-only diff per derive-panel). Returned VERDICT: approved with zero findings.

Scope-shift detection: phase-boundary signal FIRES (PR11 is the last deliverable in Phase 3; next phase doesn't exist — project is done). But two-signal-concurrence rule requires 2+ signals; only this one fires (panel clean, no user comment, no whiteboard). Single signal → append to notes_for_pr; do NOT offer inner-RPI. Loop proceeds to checkpoint.
files_touched: package.json (description string at line 4; keywords array at line 14 — 'draft' entry removed)
projects/CONVENTIONS.md (line 3 substrate description, line 7 stale cli/ path, line 68-69 verb name, line 88 PLAN.md exception description, lines 123-128 sync-shared description rewrite)
projects/2026-05-21-repo-compartmentalize/events.jsonl (substrate — carries PR10 orphan pr-opened event + new events for this unit)

changes_since_previous: PR10 (delete root bin/ shims + .gitignore entry) merged to main as PR #27. Cleanup branch reset to updated main and restarted for PR11. Same orphan-event carry pattern — PR11's first commit folds PR10's pr-opened event (substrate gap #3, captured in [[loom-pr-opened-orphan-event-and-guild-spec-path-gaps]]). PR11 closes Phase 3 and the project; after merge the project is ready for /loom-archive.
notes_for_pr: PR11 closes Phase 3 AND the repo-compartmentalize project. After PR11 merges, all 4 Phase 3 deliverables are done. Phase 3 status flips to completed. Project is ready for `/loom-archive` (which writes a project retrospective + relocates the project tree to projects/archive/).

Scope additions vs PLAN: 2 adjacent CONVENTIONS.md findings (stale cli/ path post-PR9 at line 7; stale sync-shared description from pre-PR4 at lines 123-128) folded in. Same finding-shape as PR9's derive-panel fix — downstream consequences of earlier-phase moves that the PLAN didn't anticipate.

Strike from PLAN: PLAN PR11 mentioned fixing a bogus 'LOOM-CONVENTIONS § Pairing with draft' cite at cli/lib/project.ts:148-151. That file was deleted in PR9 (root cli/); the post-PR9 file is plugins/commons/cli/lib/project.ts and a grep shows no such cite exists there today. PLAN item was stale; nothing to do.

Content-draft preservation: 5 'draft' references survive across the active surface, all intentional ('clean draft' for contract drafts, 'draft responses' x2 for PR-comment-response drafting, 'loom-absorb-draft' project name x1, 'draft or in-progress' for design status). Allowed by PLAN PR11's allowlist.

Phase-boundary scope-shift signal fired (1 of 2 needed). PR11 is the last deliverable in Phase 3 and the project has no Phase 4. Single signal → no inner-RPI; appended to notes_for_pr per the loop's single-signal flow.

Substrate gap #3 reoccurred (3rd time this session). Same Pattern A carry. Captured in [[loom-pr-opened-orphan-event-and-guild-spec-path-gaps]] memory — will guide future ev-loop runs in this project after archive.
Panel: evaluator-contract-fit (only applicable for prose+config-only diff). Approved, zero findings.
Whiteboard: skipped (Phase 3 precedent; mechanical prose sweep).
